name: Crab Crepes En Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté green onions, mushrooms, and thyme in melted margarine until tender.
2. Reduce heat to low, add flour, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
3. Gradually add milk and white wine, cooking over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly.
4. Remove from heat, stir in crabmeat, parsley, lemon juice, mustard, salt, and red pepper.
5. Spoon 1-1/2 tablespoons of the crab meat mixture down the center of each crepe.
6. Roll up the crepes and arrange them in a baking pan coated with cooking spray.
7. Cover and bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
8. Broil crepes 4 to 6 inches from heat for 1 minute or until golden brown. Serve immediately!
